verification.title: 🛡️ BlueX Dynamic OCR Multi-Factor Document Verification
verification.summary: How BlueX automatically validates provider documents in seconds with zero admin wait time:
actionPoints: 🔍 **Auto-Approval Threshold**: Documents scoring 50%+ are approved instantly by our client-side OCR engine.
✅ **Verified Badge**: Grants the green 'Verified Provider' badge, raising profile placement in Swiss search results by 3x.
